citations_valid.parenthetical: In Shirk, the court determined that an ERISA action between private litigants where money damages were the remedy did not rise to the level of seriousness which would require production of confidential bank examination materials.  The failure of a bank, however, has more widespread implications

citations_valid.cited_case_name: In re B of I Holding
In re Meta Pixel Healthcare Litig.
citations_valid.parenthetical: [T]he ESI protocol should make clear that hyperlinked documents are not treated as conventional attachments for purposes of preserving a 'family' relationship in production.
[T]he Court does not agree that a hyperlinked document is an attachment.

citations_valid.cited_case_name: In re Meta Pixel Healthcare Litig.
citations_valid.parenthetical: [T]he Court anticipates that for some documents, it will be important to collect (or attempt to collect) hyperlinked documents and associate them with the underlying ESI in which the links appear.  In such circumstances, the parties should consider reasonable requests for production of hyperlinked documents on a case-by-case basis.  Such requests should not be made as a matter of
